# KB Article Template

> Copy into `docs/kb/`. **Audience: end users** (or T1) — write plainly, no jargon without
> explanation. Sanitize.

```

3. ...

  article (<KB ID>).

```

**Quality bar:** a non-technical user can follow it without calling. Screenshots where they help
(sanitized). Reviewed/owned so it doesn't rot.
